title: Crumbs landing page — UX audit & polish backlog
subtitle: Vision-assisted audit of crumbs-production.up.railway.app as of 2026-04-22. Ranked by conversion impact.

blocks.label: One-line verdict
blocks.text: The page has voice and vibe. It does not yet have a clear value prop for first-timers, and the hero text is fighting the background illustration for legibility. Fix contrast first, then sell the thing.

blocks.markdown:
## What a first-timer sees (verbatim from vision pass)

- Biggest text on the page: **'ENFP'** — which only means something to MBTI-fluent visitors
- Background illustration competes with body copy for luminance
- Social-proof line reads '✦ 3,442 crumbs dropped today' — 'crumb' is undefined jargon to anyone not already in the app
- CTA: **'I WANT MY ROAST'** — punchy, but no hint of what happens next (cost? signup? time?)

## The first-timer's implicit objections

1. *'What does this actually do?'* — not answered above the fold
2. *'Is it free? Does it want my email?'* — no reassurance near the CTA
3. *'How long will this take?'* — no indication
4. *'Will the result be any good?'* — no sample shown

## Backlog — ranked by conversion leverage

| # | Fix | Leverage | Effort |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **Contrast fix** — dark overlay behind hero copy (`linear-gradient(rgba(13,14,40,0.85), rgba(13,14,40,0.95))`) OR confine illustration to top 30% | 🔥🔥🔥 | 20 min |
| 2 | **Value-prop H1** — 'Get roasted based on your personality type.' with sub 'Take a 60-second quiz. We'll tell you who you really are — then drag you for it.' Demote 'ENFP' to a rotating sample card | 🔥🔥🔥 | 30 min |
| 3 | **CTA specificity** — 'Roast me (takes 60 seconds) →' with tiny grey line below: 'Free · No signup · 16 personality types' | 🔥🔥 | 15 min |
| 4 | **'How it works' 3-step strip** — '1. Answer 10 questions → 2. Get your type → 3. Receive your roast' above or below the CTA | 🔥🔥 | 40 min |
| 5 | **Social proof rewording** — 'crumbs dropped' → '3,442 people roasted today' or add one attributed testimonial | 🔥 | 10 min |
| 6 | **Mobile CTA shorten** — 'Roast me →' at <400px viewport to avoid wrap | 🔥 | 5 min |
| 7 | **Sample output teaser** — blurred/teased real roast above CTA so skeptics can preview | 🔥🔥 | 1 h |
| 8 | **Footer** — 'Privacy · Terms · Contact' one-line | 🔥 | 15 min |

## Proposed PR scope — 'Landing polish v1'

Ship fixes **#1 + #2 + #3** as one PR, plus the mobile CTA tweak (#6). These are the highest-leverage changes and they compose into a single coherent above-the-fold rewrite. Total ~90 min.

**PR title draft:** `polish(landing): readable hero + clear value prop + specific CTA`

**Commit message:**
```
Landing page v1 polish — fix the three biggest conversion objections
visible to a first-time visitor.

1. Add gradient overlay behind hero so body text hits WCAG AA contrast
2. Replace 'ENFP' as H1 with plain-language value prop; move ENFP to
   a rotating sample card below
3. CTA copy: 'Roast me (60 sec) →' + reassurance line
   'Free · No signup · 16 personality types'
4. Shorten CTA to 'Roast me →' on <400px viewport

Deferred to v2: 'how it works' strip, social-proof rewording, sample
output teaser, footer.
```

## Risks

- **Voice dilution.** Crumbs' voice *is* part of the moat — replacing 'I WANT MY ROAST' with 'Roast me (60 sec) →' loses a sliver of attitude. Consider A/B if the option exists; otherwise, keep caps-lock energy in the sub-label.
- **'ENFP' as hero is intentional for MBTI-native audience.** If the current audience is already MBTI-literate (e.g., coming from TikTok), the value-prop rewrite might *reduce* resonance for the power user to help the first-timer. Metric to watch: bounce rate on the hero vs. CTA click-through.

## Dependencies / context

- Repo: `Taylorblue123/crumbs`, branch `v2-identity-card`
- Last successful deploy: Railway, via PR #1 (merged earlier today)
- Locally cloned at `~/crumbs`

blocks.label: Decision gate
blocks.text: I can draft the PR (fixes 1-3 + #6, ~90 min) as the next side-project task and open it as a draft for your review. Surfacing this as R008 in /feedback — approve and I'll build it.

items: Capture current landing HTML/CSS into research dir for diff preview
Measure current text contrast ratio (expect <2:1 based on vision)
Sketch the 3 variants in a local HTML file before touching the repo
Draft PR with small, atomic commits so you can accept/revert per fix
Post-merge: instrument CTA click-through if not already tracked
